reviews.comment:
Compré sandwichs y otras cosas en el full , me dieron la bolsita con todo supuestamente...pero me pusieron cosas de menos... cuando abrí la bolsa ya estaba en la autopista... no creo q vuelva a comprar ahí

(Translated by Google)
I bought sandwiches and other things at the convenience store. They gave me a bag with everything supposedly... but they didn't include enough items. By the time I opened the bag, I was already on the highway. I don't think I'll shop there again.
